title: Is Time Travel Possible?

scenes.text: Time travel isn't just a sci-fi dream; it's a scientific possibility!
Relativity suggests that time is relative; it can stretch and compress!
NASA even sends astronauts on missions that age them slower than people on Earth.
Black holes could warp time dramatically!
scenes.label: TIME WARPING

scenes.text: Follow for a mind-blowing fact every day.

description: Time travel may be scientifically feasible! Discover how relativity changes our perception of time. Follow for daily facts!
